Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.barrier.SafetySystemDemand

Packages that use SafetySystemDemand
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.runners
 
neqsim.process.safety.barrier
Barrier management objects for process safety functions and safety critical elements.
neqsim.process.safety.rupture
Trapped-liquid fire rupture screening for blocked-in process piping segments.

    Adds a demand case to be assessed against matching barriers.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.assessBarrier(SafetyBarrier barrier, SafetySystemDemand demandCase)

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.checkAvailabilityRequirement(PerformanceStandard standard, SafetySystemDemand demandCase, SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment assessment)
    Checks the availability requirement.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.checkEffectivenessRequirement(SafetyBarrier barrier, SafetySystemDemand demandCase, SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment assessment)
    Checks effectiveness requirements when available.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.checkPfdRequirement(SafetyBarrier barrier, PerformanceStandard standard, SafetySystemDemand demandCase, SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment assessment)
    Checks the PFD requirement.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.checkResponseTimeRequirement(PerformanceStandard standard, SafetySystemDemand demandCase, SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment assessment)
    Checks the response-time requirement.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.determineCategory(SafetyBarrier barrier, SafetySystemDemand demandCase)
    Determines a safety-system category from demand data, barrier text, and SCE type.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.evaluateDemandCapacity(SafetySystemCategory category, SafetySystemDemand demandCase, SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment assessment)
    Evaluates demand versus capacity values.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.evaluateDemandCompleteness(SafetySystemCategory category, SafetySystemDemand demandCase, SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment assessment)
    Evaluates category-specific demand completeness.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.evaluateInstrumentation(SafetySystemCategory category, SafetyBarrier barrier, SafetySystemDemand demandCase, SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment assessment)
    Evaluates linked instruments and SIF voting status.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.evaluatePerformanceStandard(SafetyBarrier barrier, SafetySystemDemand demandCase, SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment assessment)
    Evaluates quantitative performance-standard criteria.
